summary: Data engineer with 7 years building batch and streaming pipelines in fintech. Cut a core ETL runtime 68% and shipped a data platform serving 400+ internal analysts. Seeking a senior role owning data infrastructure at scale.

experience.title: Data Engineer
bullets: Cut the nightly transaction ETL runtime from 5 hours to 95 minutes (68%) by rewriting the pipeline in Spark and partitioning by merchant, unblocking morning reporting for 400+ analysts.
Built a streaming fraud-signal pipeline (Kafka, Flink) processing 12M events/day at sub-second latency, feeding the risk team's real-time scoring model.
Reduced cloud data spend 32% ($410K/year) by introducing tiered storage and killing 60+ unused nightly jobs.
Led migration of 240 legacy SQL jobs to dbt, cutting model build time 40% and giving analysts self-serve lineage.
Mentored 3 junior engineers; introduced code review and CI for data models, dropping production data incidents 55%.

experience.title: Analytics Engineer
bullets: Designed the company's first warehouse (Snowflake) consolidating 9 source systems, becoming the single source of truth for 50+ stakeholders.
Automated weekly executive reporting, saving the analytics team ~15 hours/week.
Built 30+ dbt models powering the growth team's self-serve dashboards.
